title: hieracium subtenue
intro: Hieracium subtenue, also known as the small hawkweed or yellow hawkweed, is a type of flowering plant belonging to the dandelion family (Asteraceae). The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and diuretic properties, which can help alleviate conditions such as kidney stones, urinary tract infections, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Hieracium subtenue include its ability to improve digestion, reduce fever, and act as a natural detoxifier, making it a popular remedy in traditional folk medicine. The plant can be prepared for medicinal use through infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which can be consumed as teas, taken as capsules, or applied topically to affected areas.
